summary: Dashboard Analytics Organisateur V1 fully tested and working. Backend: 13/13 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified. GET /api/appointments/analytics/stats returns all 6 KPI fields + global_message + global_tone. Statistiques tab visible and clickable. KPI cards display correctly with proper styling.

backend: test_analytics_returns_all_kpi_fields - Response contains all 8 required fields
test_global_message_and_tone_present - global_message='En attente des premiers résultats de présence', global_tone='neutral'
test_analytics_without_workspace_id - Works without workspace_id (uses all user workspaces)
frontend: Statistiques tab clickable and loads analytics data
Global message banner displayed with data-testid='analytics-global-message'
Global message shows 'En attente des premiers résultats de présence'
KPI card 'Taux de présence' shows — for null (data-testid='kpi-presence')
KPI card 'Impact caritatif' shows 0 € in green (data-testid='kpi-charity')
KPI grid layout: 3 columns on desktop, proper spacing
Text contrast adequate (dark text on light background)
Charity value uses emerald-700 green color

analytics_response_structure.presence_rate: float|null - percentage (0-100) or null if no evaluations
analytics_response_structure.acceptance_rate: float|null - percentage (0-100) or null if no participants
analytics_response_structure.charity_total_cents: integer - charity donations from captured guarantees
analytics_response_structure.organizer_defaults: integer - cancelled by organizer + organizer no-shows
analytics_response_structure.organizer_penalties_cents: integer - penalties when organizer was no-show
analytics_response_structure.global_message: string - contextual message based on presence_rate

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 120 appointments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics dashboard V1 implemented and tested. Key features: (1) GET /api/appointments/analytics/stats returns 6 KPIs + global_message + global_tone, (2) presence_rate is null when no attendance_evaluations exist, (3) acceptance_rate calculated from participants with accepted_* statuses, (4) personal_compensation_cents and charity_total_cents from distributions collection, (5) organizer_defaults = cancelled_by_organizer + organizer_no_shows, (6) global_message varies based on presence_rate thresholds (>=85% positive, >=65% neutral, <65% warning), (7) Frontend Statistiques tab in OrganizerDashboard.js loads analytics on click, (8) All KPI cards have data-testid attributes for testing.
